sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2607" key="ai)olopte/ruc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰολο-πτέρυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n2607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quickfluttering</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0377.tlg001:1:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
